memory.summary: I planned to finish analysis and reading, but a friend invited me to lunch. My low energy and stress make this social invitation appealing despite my deadline.
The friend group is ordering together, confirming a social plan. My recent 2-hour work session only partially advanced the analysis task.
I spent two hours working but the analysis section is still incomplete. With only one hour left and high stress, I must prioritize finishing the task over social plans.
The analysis deadline passed while unfinished at 0.81 progress. My stress is high and energy low, confirming I failed to prioritize the task over social plans.
No matching task 'assignment_A' exists, confirming I was working on a non-existent or already-completed assignment instead of the actual analysis task.
Time is slipping away with the analysis still incomplete. I must stop delaying and focus on finishing the task before it passes.
The analysis progress increased to 0.89, but the reading deadline passed unfinished. My stress remains high despite recent work efforts.
My analysis progress improved slightly, yet I still missed the reading deadline. With high stress and low energy, continuing this pace is unsustainable.
The missing task 'assignment_A' suggests a new priority or error. With high stress and low energy, I must clarify the actual required work before proceeding.
Waiting did not resolve the missed deadline. With energy at 0.9 and stress near 5, I need to clarify if 'assignment_A' is actually required before acting further.
Waiting confirmed the missed deadline persists. My high stress and low energy remain unchanged, requiring immediate clarification on assignment_A before acting.
Progress on the analysis section increased to 0.95 after one hour of work, though stress remains high and energy is critically low.
